params.name: Tower of Babel
params.description: The story comes from the Hebrew Book of Genesis, where humans attempted to build a tower reaching the heavens, challenging divine authority. In response, God confused their language, bringing the construction to a halt. This unfinished tower became a symbolic origin of human cultural and linguistic division. Its spiral structure was often depicted in medieval manuscripts, and during the Renaissance, it evolved into a moral allegory of human pride.
